creator: tempo@kgs.ru
text:
Has put in Asus Via K8M890 2 fxp, in broad gullies it is constantly written 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x400 
fxp0: SCB timeout: 0x80 0x60 0x90 0x0 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x400 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x0 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x0 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x0 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x0 
fxp1: SCB timeout: 0x80 0xe0 0x90 0x0 
the Given problem was in 5.4, 5.5, 6.2PRE. Replacement of network cards by others fxp has not helped. Thus there are losses.

fxp0@pci5:8:0:  class=0x020000 card=0xb0d70e11 chip=0x12298086 rev=0x05 hdr=0x00
    vendor   = 'Intel Corporation'
    device   = '82550/1/7/8/9 EtherExpress PRO/100(B) Ethernet Adapter'
    class    = network
    subclass = ethernet
fxp1@pci5:9:0:  class=0x020000 card=0x000c8086 chip=0x12298086 rev=0x08 hdr=0x00
    vendor   = 'Intel Corporation'
    device   = '82550/1/7/8/9 EtherExpress PRO/100(B) Ethernet Adapter'
    class    = network
    subclass = ethernet

Fix: 

There is no decision.
How-To-Repeat: To establish 2 fxp in Asus Via K8M890.
